title: phemeranthus rugospermus
intro: Phemeranthus rugospermus, also known as the wrinkled seed phlox or sand-verbena, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Montiaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Phemeranthus rugospermus include its ability to soothe and calm digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Phemeranthus rugospermus can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
